note: read-conformance: load a checked-in v2 table (minted from v2_append_timetravel) and observe the current state. Collapses to the PR #2 read shape — a single observation, no write-side snapshots section. decoded-rows keyed by field-id (0=__rowkey, 1=id, 2=category); row order is not significant (the orchestrator sorts by __rowkey). All three implementations must decode the same bytes to this same logical result.
